product_overview: Ommalak (3amlk) is a bilingual local services marketplace that connects clients with verified local workers for direct bookings or task-based offers. It supports phone-based authentication, a public task board, worker discovery, booking flows, and admin moderation.
core_goals: Allow clients to discover and directly book verified local workers for on-demand services
Provide a public task board where clients can post jobs and workers can submit offers
Enable workers to onboard, set availability and manage incoming bookings and offers
Support secure phone-based authentication, OTP verification, and password recovery
Give administrators tools to moderate users, approve worker profiles, and view platform statistics

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account with full name, phone number and password, then verify the phone via OTP to complete registration.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill full name -> Fill phone number -> Fill password -> Fill confirm password -> Submit registration form -> Get redirected to /verify-otp (happy path)

Navigate to /register -> Fill full name -> Fill phone number -> Fill password -> Fill confirm password with mismatched value -> Submit registration form -> See password mismatch validation error (error flow)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate using phone number and password to access the protected dashboard and user features.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill phone input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Get redirected to /dashboard on success (happy path)
Navigate to /login -> Fill phone input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See invalid credentials error (error flow)

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: Verify a phone number using a one-time code during registration or password recovery, with ability to resend the code.
user_flows: Navigate to /verify-otp -> Enter OTP code received on phone -> Submit OTP -> See confirmation and continue to /login after successful registration verification (happy path)
Navigate to /verify-otp -> Enter OTP code received on phone during forgot-password -> Submit OTP -> Get redirected to /reset-password to set a new password (happy path)
Navigate to /verify-otp -> Enter an incorrect OTP -> Submit OTP -> See invalid OTP validation error (error flow)
Navigate to /verify-otp -> Request resend OTP -> Receive new OTP and re-enter code -> Submit OTP -> See confirmation (happy path)

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Initiate password recovery by sending an OTP to the registered phone number and continuing to OTP verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill phone number -> Send OTP -> Get redirected to /verify-otp to enter the received code (happy path)
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill phone number with invalid format -> Send OTP -> See phone number validation error (error flow)

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Set a new account password after successful OTP verification, with client-side validation for password strength and match.
user_flows: Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill new password -> Fill confirm password -> Submit reset form -> See success confirmation and get redirected to /login (happy path)
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill new password -> Fill confirm password with mismatched value -> Submit reset form -> See password mismatch validation error (error flow)
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill weak password -> Submit reset form -> See weak password validation error (error flow)

features.name: Browse Workers
features.description: Search and filter the public directory of verified workers to find professionals by name, skill, category, or availability.
user_flows: Navigate to /workers -> Browse worker listings -> Search workers by name or skill -> Filter by category or availability -> Select a worker from the list to view profile details (happy path)
Navigate to /workers -> Apply filters that yield no results -> Observe empty state and adjust search or filters (user-observation flow)

features.name: Worker Profile & Booking
features.description: View a worker's detailed profile (skills, rating, reviews) and submit a booking request with required details.
user_flows: Navigate to /workers -> Select a worker from the list to view profile -> Review skills, rating and reviews -> Fill booking details -> Submit booking request -> See booking confirmation (happy path)

Navigate to /workers -> Select a worker from the list to view profile -> Fill booking details with missing required fields -> Submit booking request -> See validation error for missing booking details (error flow)

features.name: Browse Tasks
features.description: Explore the public task board to find posted jobs, filter listings, and open task details for more information.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Browse task listings -> Filter by category or status -> Select task from the list to view detail (happy path)
Navigate to /tasks -> Use filters that exclude all tasks -> Observe empty state and clear or modify filters (user-observation flow)

features.name: Task Detail & Offer
features.description: Inspect a task's full description and requirements, view existing offers, and submit an offer as a worker with price and message.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Select task from the list to view detail -> Read task description and requirements -> Submit an offer with price and message -> See offer listed among existing offers (happy path)
Navigate to /tasks -> Select task from the list to view detail -> Attempt to submit an offer with missing price or message -> See validation error for missing offer fields (error flow)

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Centralized view for authenticated users to manage bookings, view notifications, and update profile-related items.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View active and past bookings -> Cancel an active booking -> See booking moved to cancelled/past list (happy path)
Navigate to /dashboard -> View completed bookings -> Rate a completed booking and submit feedback -> See updated rating on the booking (happy path)
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open notifications panel -> View notification details (user-observation flow)

features.name: Worker Dashboard
features.description: Worker-focused dashboard to manage incoming booking requests, posted tasks, offers, and earnings information.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View incoming booking requests -> Accept a booking request -> See booking added to upcoming bookings (happy path)
Navigate to /dashboard -> View incoming booking requests -> Reject a booking request -> See request removed from incoming list (happy path)
Navigate to /dashboard -> View posted tasks and offers -> Open a task to review offers (user-observation flow)

features.name: Become Worker
features.description: Upgrade a user account to a worker profile by submitting skills, description, rates, and availability for admin review.
user_flows: Navigate to /become-worker -> Fill skills and description -> Set hourly rate and availability -> Submit worker profile form -> See submission confirmation and note about admin approval (happy path)
Navigate to /become-worker -> Leave required fields blank -> Submit worker profile form -> See validation errors for missing fields (error flow)

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Administrative interface for platform operators to view high-level statistics, moderate content, manage users, and approve or reject worker applications.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View platform statistics and charts -> Open user management -> Review user list and details -> Moderate or delete a user (happy path)
Navigate to /admin -> Open pending worker applications -> Approve a worker application -> See worker moved to verified list (happy path)
Navigate to /admin -> Open pending worker applications -> Reject a worker application -> See application marked rejected with optional admin note (happy path)

routes.description: OTP verification page after registration or forgot-password
Forgot password - sends OTP to phone
View a worker's profile and book them
User or worker dashboard depending on role
Form to register as a worker
Admin dashboard for managing users and platform

known_limitations.issue: Registration form sends OTP before verifying if phone number is valid format
known_limitations.impact: Invalid phone numbers will trigger an API call and show a server error instead of a client-side validation error
